# 结构化注册表索引

<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate-registry-index.py. Do not edit manually. -->

本页由 `data/registry/*.yml` 生成，面向读者提供结构化路径入口。注册表位置正文仍由人工维护。

## NTUSER.DAT

| 路径 | 简述 | Root | 主题 | 页面 | 相关场景 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run`<br>`HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\RunOnce` | 用户级登录启动项，只作用于对应用户 SID 的登录会话。 | `HKCU` | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> | [HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run](hkcu/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/run.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |

## SOFTWARE

| 路径 | 简述 | Root | 主题 | 页面 | 相关场景 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList` | SID 到用户 profile 目录的机器级映射。 | `HKLM` | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">账户</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/profilelist.md) | [账户与安全](../questions/accounts-security.md)<br>[Shell / Explorer 用户行为](../questions/shell-explorer.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| `HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon` | 交互式登录流程、Shell、Userinit、自动登录和部分 Winlogon 扩展配置。 | `HKLM` | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">账户</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/winlogon.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[账户与安全](../questions/accounts-security.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| `HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run`<br>`HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\RunOnce` | 机器级登录启动项，适用于所有用户登录后的自动启动命令。 | `HKLM` | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run](hklm/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/run.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |

## SYSTEM

| 路径 | 简述 | Root | 主题 | 页面 | 相关场景 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet001` | SYSTEM hive 中保存系统控制配置的真实控制集。 | `HKLM` | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x](hklm/system/controlset/index.md) | [常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md)<br>[自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[RDP 与远程访问](../questions/rdp.md) |
| `HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\USBSTOR`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Enum\USBSTOR` | USB Mass Storage 设备枚举信息。 | `HKLM` | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Enum\USBSTOR](hklm/system/controlset/enum/usbstor.md) | [USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| `HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services` | 服务、驱动、网络组件和部分系统组件的配置入口。 | `HKLM` | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">持久化</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">网络</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services](hklm/system/controlset/services/index.md) | [自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[程序执行痕迹](../questions/execution.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| `HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces` | 单个网络接口的 IP、DNS、DHCP、网关和租约配置。 | `HKLM` | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">网络</span> <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces](hklm/system/controlset/services/tcpip/parameters/interfaces.md) | [网络与系统环境](../questions/network.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| `HKLM\SYSTEM\MountedDevices` | 卷 GUID、DOS 盘符和设备标识之间的映射。 | `HKLM` | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">设备</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\MountedDevices](hklm/system/mounteddevices.md) | [USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md)<br>[Shell / Explorer 用户行为](../questions/shell-explorer.md)<br>[常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md) |
| `HKLM\SYSTEM\Select` | CurrentControlSet 与真实 ControlSet00x 的映射关系。 | `HKLM` | <span class="ww-chip ww-chip--topic">系统配置</span> | [HKLM\SYSTEM\Select](hklm/system/select.md) | [常规注册表检查](../questions/registry-checklist.md)<br>[自启动与持久化](../questions/persistence.md)<br>[USB 与外接设备](../questions/usb.md) |

## 按主题

| 主题 | 路径 | Hive | 页面 |
|---|---|---|---|
| 持久化 | `HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run`<br>`HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon`<br>`HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services` | `NTUSER.DAT`<br>`SOFTWARE`<br>`SOFTWARE`<br>`SYSTEM`<br>`SYSTEM` | [HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run](hkcu/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/run.md)<br>[HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/winlogon.md)<br>[HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run](hklm/software/microsoft/windows/currentversion/run.md)<br>[HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x](hklm/system/controlset/index.md)<br>[HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services](hklm/system/controlset/services/index.md) |
| 系统配置 | `HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\Select` | `SYSTEM`<br>`SYSTEM`<br>`SYSTEM`<br>`SYSTEM` | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x](hklm/system/controlset/index.md)<br>[HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services](hklm/system/controlset/services/index.md)<br>[HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces](hklm/system/controlset/services/tcpip/parameters/interfaces.md)<br>[HKLM\SYSTEM\Select](hklm/system/select.md) |
| 网络 | `HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces` | `SYSTEM`<br>`SYSTEM` | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services](hklm/system/controlset/services/index.md)<br>[HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Services\Tcpip\Parameters\Interfaces](hklm/system/controlset/services/tcpip/parameters/interfaces.md) |
| 设备 | `HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Enum\USBSTOR`<br>`HKLM\SYSTEM\MountedDevices` | `SYSTEM`<br>`SYSTEM`<br>`SYSTEM` | [HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x](hklm/system/controlset/index.md)<br>[HKLM\SYSTEM\ControlSet00x\Enum\USBSTOR](hklm/system/controlset/enum/usbstor.md)<br>[HKLM\SYSTEM\MountedDevices](hklm/system/mounteddevices.md) |
| 账户 | `HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList`<br>`HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon` | `SOFTWARE`<br>`SOFTWARE` | [HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ProfileList](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/profilelist.md)<br>[HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon](hklm/software/microsoft/windows-nt/currentversion/winlogon.md) |
